title: Fix Admin Panel Users Table and Add Unique ID Search Bar

requirements.text: Fix the UsersControlsPanel component (frontend/src/components/admin/UsersControlsPanel.tsx) so that the user list table correctly fetches and renders all registered users by properly calling the useGetAllUsers hook. Ensure the table displays each user's Name, Server, Unique Code, Device ID (truncated), isBlocked status, and Block/Unblock buttons. The table must show data as soon as the 'Users & Controls' tab is active, with a loading skeleton while fetching and an empty-state message if no users are registered yet.
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the 'Users & Controls' tab in the admin panel triggers the useGetAllUsers hook fetch
All registered users appear in the table with Name, Server, Unique Code, Device ID (truncated), and Block/Unblock button
A loading skeleton is shown while the fetch is in progress
An 'No users registered yet' empty-state message is shown when the array is empty (length === 0)
The table data updates automatically after a Block or Unblock action invalidates the query cache

requirements.text: Add a search/filter input bar above the users table in the UsersControlsPanel component (frontend/src/components/admin/UsersControlsPanel.tsx) labeled 'Search by Unique ID'. As the admin types into this field, the displayed user rows must be filtered client-side to only show entries whose Unique Code contains the entered string (case-insensitive). Clearing the input restores the full unfiltered list.

quotes: not showing search unique id bar

acceptanceCriteria: A text input field labeled 'Search by Unique ID' appears above the users table
Typing any string filters the table rows to only those whose Unique Code contains the input value (case-insensitive)
Clearing the search input restores all rows
The search filter works purely client-side with no additional backend calls
The search bar is visible and functional on both mobile and desktop layouts

requirements.text: Verify the backend getAllUsers() query function in backend/main.mo correctly iterates over the stable users variable and returns all stored user records as an array. Ensure the return type matches the frontend's expected shape (uniqueCode: Text, deviceId: Text, name: Text, server: Text, isBlocked: Bool) and that no trap or rejection occurs. If any issue is found, fix it so the function reliably returns all registered users.
acceptanceCriteria: Calling getAllUsers() from the frontend returns an array of all user records registered via registerUser()
Each returned record contains uniqueCode, deviceId, name, server, and isBlocked fields
The function does not trap or reject on any valid state
A user registered via registerUser() appears in the next getAllUsers() call

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not remove or alter the existing History and Downloads sections of the Hamburger Menu
The PIN for admin access remains '09186114' and must not be changed
nonGoals: Changing the login flow or user registration logic
Modifying the maintenance mode toggle functionality
Altering the content upload or delete forms
Adding new backend data fields beyond what is already defined for user records
